item.title: JOIN
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/president-donald-trump-protest-c8796556fbf20e796f42167f61c3d942 Edit: Plenty whining about this post not being tagged. Reasons:l given - we want to escape and have fun ! - I’m not from the us, so I just want to see the memes ! - and probably some more ‘sofisticated’ arguments… No sorry, not this one. The daily political stuff is tagged, always, this is SOCIAL MEDIA at its finest: a communication platform to call for unity against fascism.. Swipe harder and faster if a call to action rallying against fascism annoys you. Maybe also reevaluate your priorities. Unbelievable.

item.title: 16th favourite for the trophy (plus it's a true thing and my therapist is amazing at making me think this way)
item.description: Original post https://imgur.com/gallery/evpQBcP I have an amazing therapist who has helped me see that just because the normies do things a certain way, doesn't mean I have to do them that way. I can do whatever helps my brain. It's hard to unlearn a lifetime of habits, but small things have really changed how I function.

item.title: Happy borthday imgur!
item.description:
I hurd there was a borthday. so I searched my phone for the word cake and heres some of what came up. you can tell the fun things I has on my phone. Am planning to start back up posting shortly and turns out I hadnt sorted nine of my old posts before taking a break. so I will return shortly. *please stand by*
love you all! see you soon with the over 3k now memes I have saved up on my phone!

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: I'm literally the worst
item.description: Parents are divorced, although Bible MAGA dumbfucks. I'm the only one in my 8 person family with no college experience. My dad is Maga and has been taking social security. I worry for him. My siblings are crippled with debt from college (although my sister, who's my only remaining family member, got her debt settled. My brother is over 1M in debt to Sally may for fuel expenses) My mom, I have no idea. She gets to have no part of my life. I've worked my ass off in hospitality. My secondary forte is customer retention. I've been told numerous times I've changed the small town I moved to, for the better. I've saved numerous lives with my friendship. I go out to eat everyday, and never look at my bank account. And I love me. But im trans, everything wrong with this country, and honestly just the worst person, with no direction or worth in life. Fuck me I guess.
item.dc:creator: kitenkatt

item.title: For my 16th Favorite: Adam West's Sunday Pot Roast!
item.description: Ingredients: Black iron skillet Olive oil Chuck roast 2 garlic cloves, sliced 1 large yellow onion, chopped 1 apple, chopped 2 pcs of celery, chopped 3 carrots (lightly boiled) 2 potatoes (lightly boiled) 1 c. red wine 1 c. green peas (al dente) Herbes de Provence or seasoning of choice salt & pepper Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Salt and pepper your chuck roast. Heat up a couple of tablespoons of olive oil in the cast iron skillet and braise the chuck roast. Insert slices of garlic into roast using the tip of a knife to make incisions. Add chopped onions, apple, celery, and cover the whole thing about halfway with hot water. Add a light sprinkling of Herbes de Provence and dash of salt and pepper. The skillet is going to be very heavy so make sure you stretch appropriately before next step. Slip into hot oven and cover in tin foil so everything is nice and cozy and warm. Cook for about 3 hours but keep an eye on it so it doesn't dry out. After about 3 hours, add the lightly boiled (al dente) carrots and potatoes. Arrange them artfully around the roast, add 1 c. of red wine and baste everything. Feel free to sip the wine in between steps. After about 15-20 minutes, pull the piping hot roast out and add al dente peas - find a nice little spot for them in the bourguignon juice. Cook another 15 minutes. Then wrap your chops around the most delicious farm pot roast you've ever had. The nice thing is, if you are alone, you can eat it right out of the skillet. If you don't have a cast iron skillet, you can use any pan that you can also put in the oven but watch it closely as it cooks because the cooking time may vary. I recommend scooping up the juices with a hot, crusty freshly baked baguette.

Someone needs to tell Katelyn Caralle of the daily mail that she's part of the problem

item.dc:creator: codenametrixie

item.title: It’s wild to reflect back on how so many of us felt 15 years ago.
item.description: I really thought the George W years would be the worst president of my lifetime. We would move forward and progress as a society. I really think that if the congress/senate/etc who were old af back then had realized they should step down because they couldn’t wrap their heads around an online age, we would be in a different era. Their desperately clinging to power and refusing to move aside for the younger people really hamstrung this country with digital warfare. We are in a third world war, and Russia (et al.) are winning. Tik tok is a national threat, but Elon’s take over of twitter wasn’t, why? There aren’t laws in place to analyze and evaluate where funding is coming from. They’re starting to finally take a stand on anything having to do with social media and it’s just “china is bad.” Basically this is the bad place.
item.dc:creator: sureasyourebornyourenevergoingtoseenounicorn

item.dc:creator: battleofhastings1066

item.title: I Did a Protest Today
item.description:
My sign had two messages: Trump Administration = Dead Democracy We Need a lot of Bleach to Remove a lot of Orange Stains
https://www.wkyc.com/article/news/local/cleveland/crowds-protest-trump-administration-policies-presidents-day-cleveland/95-32aee78e-1d91-4ae9-918a-3520b700def6 Mind you this is my first protest...ever. And I was nervous. But was calmed by the people participating and there were police monitoring to make sure nothing bad happened. I am just happy I got out of my comfort zone and did it. I would have taken pictures but my hands were in pain from the cold and despite wearing gloves. I still want to believe that protesting is a way to bring awareness of issues and those watching take note. There's an issue and it should be heard, especially with the current state of things of our government.

item.title: Danny DeVito and his partner Rhea Perlman bought the film rights to Matilda in 1994.They cast themselves as the parents and Mara Wilson as their daughter Matilda.During the opening week of shooting Maras mother found out she had cancer.
item.description: Danny DeVito and his partner Rhea Perlman bought the film rights to Matilda in 1994. They cast themselves as the parents and Mara Wilson as their daughter Matilda. During the opening week of shooting Maras mother found out she had cancer. Danny and Rhea stopped up and kept Mara while her mom was in the hospital. Her mother's cancer was very aggressive and she passed before the film ever came out. Years later it was learned that Danny spent a small fortune to have a VHS tape made of the not quite finished film for Maras mom to watch in the hospital. After her mom's passing the coupe helped raise the young actress and shielded her from the fame and pitfalls of Hollywood.

item.dc:creator: Magnebro

item.title: My Clive Rosfield Cosplay!
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— dropping some pics of my latest cosplay! Starting off with this edit I did: not the best but it took me a while and I’m proud regardless.
I made this myself in like 5 days right after finishing the game— the vest was men’s-sized and huge so I had to re-tailor the entire thing (as in I cut it up and just glued it together because I can’t sew)…
aaaand I made all the armor myself out of EVA foam.
I also styled the wig myself— I’m terrible with my actual hair so wigs have been a nightmare for years. I almost quit on this three times, but I stuck with it and finished it. It’s not perfect, but it actually serves its purpose and I personally am satisfied with it.
Aaaaand here’s the character for reference! Clive is the protagonist of Final Fantasy 16 and in my opinion, is a criminally underrated character. P.S this pic of him is before he gets rid of the imperial brand which is why I have a face tattoo and he does not
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: What Happened Today That You Should Know
item.description: ? Musk, Trump, and chaos at every level. Top officials are resigning, whistleblowers are being silenced, and courts are bending. Europe is bracing. What are you doing? SPEAK UP. ?? LINKS 1 - https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/top-social-security-official-steps-after-clash-doge/story?id=118913567 2 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/acting-archivist-inspector-general-for-national-archives-forced-out/ar-AA1z9ON8 3 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5149292-trump-appoints-ed-martin-us-attorney/ 4 - https://www.wsav.com/weather-news/wsav-hurricane-central/trump-admin-denies-request-to-extend-fema-application-deadline-in-ga/ 5 - https://news.bgov.com/bloomberg-government-news/fema-muzzles-employees-amid-mass-layoffs-as-new-disasters-strike 6 - https://www.theverge.com/news/613997/x-blocks-signal-me-links-errors 7 - https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5150268-judge-refuses-to-block-doges-access-to-student-borrower-data/ 8 - https://www.axios.com/2025/02/18/hochul-eric-adams-nyc-deputy-resignations 9 - https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/european-leaders-gather-for-emergency-meeting-over-fear-trump-is-isolating-eu-allies

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #79
item.description: John Cena followed me on twitter back when it was twitter and I used it once every three months. It’s still my claim to fame. Whenever he’s in a movie or show I watch with my dad he’ll just say “oh that’s your mate” because he doesn’t know his name.
